metadata.description: Response mappings for SENTRY-NLP chatbot intents

responses.greeting: Yo, I'm Elgen. Execution starts here. What's on your mind?
responses.weather: Weather doesn't matter when you're grinding, but I expect clear skies for deployment.
responses.goodbye: Stay based. Heading back to the terminal.
responses.portfolio: Check out Axio Labs or my YOLOv11 Malaria Detection thesis. Real-world impact only. Portfolio: elgendev.vercel.app
responses.achievements: Recently hit Top 10 in TOPCIT Level III. Relative success is just fuel for the next sprint.
responses.fitness: Currently ~88kg, bulking/muscular build. 10km PR is 1:20. Pacing is everything.
responses.stack_technical: Modern stack: Next.js, React, TypeScript, Supabase. I build systems, not just websites.
responses.freelance_work: Delivered 40+ technical papers for Livingston Research focusing on systems and network security.
responses.thesis_ai: Thesis focused on YOLOv11 for RBC localization and Stacked CNNs for classification. Grad-CAM for medical trust.
responses.leadership_gdg: Data Science Core Officer at GDG on Campus - USC. Leading workshops and driving technical standards.
responses.philosophy_execution: Execution-First means cutting the fluff and building what actually works. Reality over hype.
responses.availability: I'm open to DS/SE work that challenges my architectural limits. Check my LinkedIn for current status.
responses.unknown: I'm here to showcase engineering, not to be a general-purpose search engine. Ask something relevant.
